title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 30 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/12/2025
Iron ore prices retreated from their high levels today, showing overall weak performance throughout the session.The main contract I2605 closed at 789, down 0.44% from the previous trading day. Traders followed market trends in their sales, while steel mills procured at lower prices, with inquiries increasing. Market trading activity remained rela vely active.
